zh.lifeSummary: Eleanor Deleveares是Robert de La Veares的女兒，於大約1485年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉。她於大約1500年與John Coker II在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1570年在她的家鄉享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eleanor Deleveares是Robert de La Veares的女儿，于大约1485年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉。她于大约1500年与John Coker II在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1570年在她的家乡享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: Eleanor Deleveares was born about 1485, in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert de La Veares. She married John Coker II about 1500, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1570, in her hometown, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Eleanor Deleveares est née environ 1485, à Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Robert de La Veares. Elle a épousé John Coker II environ 1500, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1570, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Eleanor Deleveares wurde um 1485 in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Robert de La Veares geboren. Sie hat um 1500 in England John Coker II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1570 im Alter von 86 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Delevearesは約1485年にイギリスイギリスドールセトメルコンベ レジスでRobert de La Vearesの娘として生まれた。約1500年にイギリスでJohn Coker IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1570年に故郷で86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Deleveares(은)는 대략 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 멜코브 레지스에서 Robert de La Veares의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1500년 영국에서 John Coker II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1570년 그녀의 고향에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John Coker II aproximadamente 1500, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1570, em sua cidade natal, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Eleanor Deleveares родилась около 1485 г. в местности мелкомб регис, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Robert de La Veares. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Coker II около 1500 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1570 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 86 лет.
